channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Fruita Wildcats dominate both ends of the court in rivalry showdown
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— The Fruita Monument High School Wildcats girls’ basketball team continued their dominant form Tuesday night, following a blowout win over Central with a convincing victory over the Palisade Bulldogs.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: The 49ers bring back Robert Saleh for 2nd stint as defensive coordinator
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The San Francisco 49ers hired Robert Saleh for a second stint as defensive coordinator on Friday night after a failed tenure as head coach of the New York Jets. Saleh had been a candidate for head coaching jobs with Jacksonville, Dallas and Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hurricanes acquire Rantanen from Avs, Hall from Blackhawks in 3-team trade
item.description: The Carolina Hurricanes have acquired forwards Mikko Rantanen from the Colorado Avalanche and Taylor Hall from the Chicago Blackhawks in a three-team trade.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Beard, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: No. 2 South Carolina gets another big win against No. 5 LSU to continue SEC domination
item.description: COLUMBIA, S.C. (AP) — South Carolina showed once more who’s in charge of the Southeastern Conference. The No. 2 Gamecocks (19-1, 7-0 SEC) got 14 points from Joyce Edwards and used their trademark lockdown defense to end No. 5 LSU’s perfect start to the season with a 66-56 victory on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Harris English makes a late charge to the take 3rd-round lead at the Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — Harris English has been on a roll at Torrey Pines before, so the feeling was familiar when he really got it going late in the third round of the Farmers Insurance Open.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Coaches Staley, Mulkey show off their fashion style in LSU-South Carolina showdown
item.description: No. 2 South Carolina and No. 5 LSU featured the last two national champions and two of the best teams in the country this season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Tanner Scott's $72 million, 4-year contract with Dodgers includes $21 million in deferred money
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Reliever Tanner Scott's $72 million, four-year contract with the Los Angeles Dodgers includes $21 million in deferred salaries. Scott receives a $20 million signing bonus as part of the agreement announced Thursday, payable in four equal installments each Feb. 1 from 2025-28.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: No deal. Young collector who nabbed one-of-a-kind Paul Skenes card turns down Pirates trade offer
item.description: The young collector who scored a one-of-a-kind baseball card featuring National League Rookie of the Year Paul Skenes has turned down a trade offer from the Pittsburgh Pirates.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: LeBron James picked for 21st straight All-Star Game, extending NBA record
item.description: LeBron James is extending his All-Star records. And Giannis Antetokounmpo is the people’s choice, again. The NBA revealed the starters — some of them, anyway — for the revamped All-Star Game on Thursday night, and there wasn't much in the way of surprises.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Steph Curry to start NBA All-Star Game in San Francisco
item.description: (KRON) -- The NBA All-Star Game is set to happen in San Francisco next month, and the city's biggest star was named one of the game's 10 starters. The NBA revealed the starters on Thursday, and Stephen Curry was among them. It will be Curry's 11th All-Star Game.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Real Salt Lake adds striker Ariath Piol to attacking lineup from Australia A-League
item.description: Real Salt Lake is adding firepower to its attacking lineup, announcing on Thursday the club has signed 20-year-old Australian striker Ariath Piol to the team.
item.dc:creator: Derick Fox, ABC 4

item.title: Runnin' Utes crushed by #7 Houston, 70-36
item.description: HOUSTON (ABC4 Sports) - Riding a three-game winning streak, the Runnin' Utes had gained some confidence the last couple of weeks. But Wednesday night against #7 Houston, the Utes came crashing back down to Earth. Milos Uzan scored 14 points, L.J. Cryer added 13 points and No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz trade draft picks to Phoenix Suns
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz have so many first round draft picks over the next few years, they traded three of them to get one future first-rounder.
item.dc:creator: ABC 4

item.title: Four players with San Diego ties to play at 2025 Farmers Insurance Open
item.description: The 2025 Farmers Insurance Open kicks off Wednesday morning at Torrey Pines Golf Course in La Jolla with a purse of $9.3 million up for grabs over the four-day event.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Rondé Barber helps build Habitat for Humanity home
item.description: ST. PETERSBURGH, Fla. (WFLA) - Community leaders got together Tuesday to build a home for a family in St. Petersburg. This will serve as the first official build day for Habitat for Humanity Tampa Bay Gulfside's fourth annual CEO Build.
item.dc:creator: WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah closes homestand strong with 5-2 win over Winnipeg
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - After a slow start to their season-long 7-game homestand, the Utah Hockey Club finished it strong. Barrett Hayton scored and had two assists, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Winnipeg Jets 5-2 at Delta Center on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Red Rocks win Best of Utah as Smith wins all-around
item.description: WEST VALLEY CITY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The #5 Red Rocks broke out in a big way on Monday night at the Maverik Center, posting a 197.950 to win the Best of Utah meet and tying Oklahoma for the highest score in the nation this season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: CMU Softball ready to chase another dominant season in 2025
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)— After a record-breaking 2024 campaign that ended in postseason disappointment, the Colorado Mesa University softball team is gearing up for another dominant season.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Travis Kelce makes NFL history in first game of three-peat quest
item.description: Travis Kelce is now the only player ever to catch at least 100 passes in seven straight seasons, including the postseason.
item.dc:creator: Dillon Seckington, NewsNation

item.title: Hoyer says Cubs are focused on improving bullpen and bench
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Chicago Cubs are focused on improving their bullpen and bench at this point in the offseason, according to president of baseball operations Jed Hoyer.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9
